name: Uninsured lawyer used AI referral badly—what recourse in NY?
description: Personal suit + NY fund up to $50k.

mainEntity.name: Uninsured lawyer used AI referral badly—what recourse in NY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Personal suit + NY fund up to $50k.
acceptedAnswer.description: Sue personally; check bar fund for aid. New York Lawyers' Fund covers up to $50k. Key factors: (1) Asset search; (2) Judgment collection; (3) Fund app. Still pursue.
